name: modulo_addition_learned_emb_mlp
description: Two-layer MLP with learned input embeddings trained on modular arithmetic. Inputs a and b are each embedded into d_embed-dimensional space and summed before the hidden layer. No attention, no positional embedding, no residual stream. Rung 2 of the architecture ladder: tests whether learned representations alone create geometric pressure without attention routing.

data_seed.description: Random seed for train/test split of the (a, b) input grid

analysis_dataset.description: Full (a, b) input grid as integer index pairs (a, b) — not one-hot encoded
